project.name: EuroOpenCharts
project.navigation_warning: Experimental scientific prototype. Not for navigation.

openbridge_icons.name: OpenBridge Icons
openbridge_icons.license: OpenBridge license; verify redistribution rights before bundling assets
openbridge_icons.notes: Use local/offline SVG exports from the OpenBridge icon collection for maritime HMI symbols whenever applicable. Raster-only icons and silent substitutions are forbidden.

local_basemap_gshhs.name: GSHHS coastlines distributed with Basemap data package

quality.intended_use: High-resolution coastline rendering for the AOI
quality.nominal_scale: GSHHS high-resolution coastline dataset selected by Basemap resolution=h
quality.feature_resolution: High-resolution vector coastline; preserve source geometry, no manual simplification

local_basemap_etopo1.name: ETOPO1 shaded relief image distributed with Basemap data package
local_basemap_etopo1.role: relief and bathymetric background rendering, not numeric bathymetry

quality.feature_resolution: ETOPO1 one-arc-minute raster background; not used as authoritative numeric bathymetry

gebco_grid.name: GEBCO global gridded bathymetry
gebco_grid.role: best available open bathymetry candidate for future numeric depth products
gebco_grid.license: GEBCO Terms of Use; verify suitability before redistribution

quality.intended_use: Highest available open gridded bathymetry for the AOI
quality.feature_resolution: Use the newest official GEBCO regional subset available for the AOI; do not resample upward to fake detail

gebco_grid.notes: Configure url below to a GEBCO regional subset or mirrored archive. The workflow records provenance and does not fabricate a fallback.

emodnet_bathymetry.name: EMODnet Bathymetry regional products
emodnet_bathymetry.role: European bathymetry and metadata source candidate
emodnet_bathymetry.license: EMODnet data policy; verify dataset-specific terms before redistribution

quality.intended_use: Best European regional bathymetry and uncertainty metadata for the AOI
quality.feature_resolution: Use the highest-resolution EMODnet Bathymetry product available for the AOI with source metadata

emodnet_bathymetry.notes: Configure url below to an authoritative EMODnet export/subset for the AOI.

openseamap_osm.name: OpenStreetMap/OpenSeaMap seamark extract
openseamap_osm.role: open seamarks, lights, harbors, marinas and nautical POIs

quality.intended_use: Current high-resolution vector seamarks, coastline-adjacent nautical features, harbors, marinas, bays, anchorages, lights and buoys
quality.feature_resolution: Use unsimplified AOI vector extract with full OSM/SeaMark tags and timestamped replication metadata
quality.nominal_scale: Source vector features; no rendering-time feature fabrication

freshness.update_policy: Refresh the OSM/OpenSeaMap AOI extract before production if it is older than 30 days; do not reuse stale harbor, marina, bay, anchorage, buoy, beacon or light lists.

openseamap_osm.notes: Configure url below to an Overpass, Geofabrik, or other ODbL-compliant extract.

official_mpa_geojson.name: Official or openly licensed Marine Protected Areas input
official_mpa_geojson.role: MPA geometry, zones, permissions and rules
official_mpa_geojson.license: MUST be provided with the actual source dataset

quality.intended_use: Authoritative MPA polygons, zones, permissions and rules
quality.feature_resolution: Official unsimplified polygon/multipolygon geometry and legal-rule attributes, including official identifier, designation, status, managing authority, legal instrument, zone IDs, zone names and zone classifications
quality.nominal_scale: Official source scale must be recorded with the source dataset

freshness.update_policy: Verify MPA geometry and legal-rule files against the official authority before production; stale files must be refreshed or omitted with a manifest reason.

official_mpa_geojson.notes: The example keeps this optional unless authoritative geometry and rules URLs are configured.
